summary: Iteration 2 regression complete. Backend: 19/19 pytest passed including 3 new dashboard stats assertions (high_risk_alerts, overdue_tasks, missing_records all present, integer, behave per spec — high_risk_alerts increments for safeguarding-open and high-severity-open, decrements when closed). Frontend: full redesign verified — Login shows Safelyn Systems shield + blue→green gradient + slogan; Dashboard shows brand banner, personalised greeting (time-of-day + first name), both hero buttons, all 3 risk tiles, all 7 action cards; hero + card navigation all correct; ComingSoon pages render for /staff /supervisions /ofsted; sidebar has the 3 new nav items and they are clickable; /reports remains manager/admin gated; mobile at 390px has 0px horizontal overflow with proper stacking.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx does not handle /dashboard/stats API failure (no try/catch, no error state) — if the endpoint 500s the page stays stuck with 0s and no feedback. Add error/loading state.

overdue_tasks spec says status=open AND created >48h ago; test data currently has 0 matching, so field-level logic was only smoke-tested (value present + integer + >=0). Recommend a seeded or synthetic back-dated incident for full behavioural coverage in a follow-up iteration.
missing_records (0 in current seed) similarly smoke-tested only; logic branch (residents with NO note in last 24h) was not triggered to a non-zero value during this run.
Login page slogan is rendered on three separate <div>/<h1> lines, so a naive exact-string match fails; acceptable UX choice but docs/tests should note the visual split.
Still-open items from iter 1: deprecated FastAPI on_event, raw exception text leaked from /voice/transcribe and /reports/generate, no login brute-force lockout (per playbook).
test_credentials: admin@care.local/Admin@123, manager@care.local/Manager@123, staff@care.local/Staff@123 — all verified working.
seed_data_creation: Test creates TEST_Resident_A, TEST_note, several TEST_incident rows (including high-severity and safeguarding variants used to validate high_risk_alerts logic). Teardown removes TEST_ residents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (19 tests). New TestDashboard tests explicitly validate high_risk_alerts increment/decrement against safeguarding-open and high-severity-open. Frontend Playwright flow: login as manager@care.local → verify dashboard testids (hero-log-incident, hero-add-note, risk-high-alerts, risk-overdue, risk-missing, card-residents/notes/incidents/staff/supervisions/reports/ofsted) → verify nav from each → check ComingSoon on /staff /supervisions /ofsted → mobile 390px overflow check. JWT in localStorage as cc_token. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is https://safeguard-dash-1.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All iteration-2 acceptance criteria met.
